chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَوْمِ الْمُتَمَتِّعِ إِذَا لَمْ يَجِدِ الْهَدْيَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 191 – The Fasting of the performer of Tumatto when he cannot find (afford) the sacrificial animal

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/195)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/195)

parts.text: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: هُ قَالَ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ هَدْياً وَ أَحَبَّ أَنْ يُقَدِّمَ الثَّلَاثَةَ الْأَيَّامِ فِي أَوَّلِ الْعَشْرِ فَلَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abdul Kareem Bin Amro, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who cannot find a sacrificial animal and would like to bring forward the three days (of Fasting) during the first ten (days), so there is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr has narrated from ‘Abd al-Karim ibn ‘Amr from Zurarah who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, (abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah), ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, ‘One who cannot find an offering and likes to fast the three days during the first ten days, it is not an offense for him to do so.”
